moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Day
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships conclude today, July 12th, after two weeks of thrilling tennis action at the All England Club.

angles.name: Wimbledon Wrap-Up
angles.copy: Game, set, match! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its final champions today. Who lifted the singles trophies this year? #Wimbledon

angles.name: London's Tennis Spectacle
angles.copy: Another incredible Wimbledon comes to a close in London today. What was your favourite moment from SW19 this year?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues with intense knockout matches this week, leading to the semi-finals on July 14-15 and the final on July 19th.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup knockout stages are firing up! Who are you backing to make it to the semi-finals this week? #FIFAWorldCup2026

angles.name: Road to the Final
angles.copy: Only a few games left until the World Cup final next Sunday. Every match is do-or-die now! Which team has impressed you most so far?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship officially starts its practice days today, July 12th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, with the tournament proper running from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Show
angles.copy: The Open Championship is underway at Royal Birkdale! The world's best golfers are gearing up for the quest for the Claret Jug. #TheOpen

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Calling
angles.copy: Practice rounds have begun at Royal Birkdale for The Open! Who do you think will master the links and take home the title this year?

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a major highlight of the 2026 athletics season, takes place on July 18th at the London Stadium, featuring world-class track and field athletes.

angles.name: Track and Field Stars
angles.copy: London Stadium gets ready for a massive athletics showdown next Saturday! Who's excited for the London Athletics Meet?

angles.name: Race to Glory
angles.copy: World-class athletes are descending on London for the Athletics Meet on July 18th. Get ready for some incredible performances!

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Approaching
moments.blurb: Glasgow is preparing to host the 2026 Commonwealth Games from July 23rd to August 2nd, with over 3,000 athletes competing across various sports.

angles.name: Commonwealth Countdown
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are just around the corner! Glasgow is set to welcome athletes from across the globe starting July 23rd. #Glasgow2026

angles.name: Scotland's Sporting Summer
angles.copy: Get ready for 11 days of elite sport! The Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow next week. Which events are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival Concludes
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival in Birmingham wraps up today, July 12th, after a weekend celebrating innovative UK and international music.

angles.name: Birmingham's Groove Ends
angles.copy: The final notes of the Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival are ringing out in Birmingham today. What a weekend of incredible music!

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Did you catch any of the amazing acts at the Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival this weekend? What was your highlight?

moments.title: System Of A Down in London
moments.blurb: System Of A Down play two highly anticipated London shows at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on July 13th and 15th, their first UK appearance in years.

angles.name: SOAD Takes Over London
angles.copy: System Of A Down are bringing their unique sound to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium this week! Ready for their first London shows in over a decade?

angles.name: Rocking the Capital
angles.copy: It's System Of A Down week in London! Two massive nights of rock are coming. Who's got tickets?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival (HebCelt) begins on July 15th in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music.

angles.name: Celtic Sounds Calling
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts this Wednesday! Four days of incredible music and culture on the stunning Outer Hebrides. #HebCelt

angles.name: Island Festival Fun
angles.copy: Stornoway is getting ready for HebCelt! Who's heading to the islands for this celebration of Celtic talent?

moments.title: BBC Proms Season Begins
moments.blurb: The world-renowned BBC Proms classical music festival commences its eight-week season at the Royal Albert Hall on July 17th.

angles.name: Proms in Full Swing
angles.copy: The BBC Proms begin this Friday! Eight weeks of exquisite classical music at the Royal Albert Hall. #BBCProms

angles.name: Summer of Sound
angles.copy: Get ready for a summer of world-class music as the Proms kick off in London. What's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival takes place on July 18-19 at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, featuring five stages of music.

angles.name: Nottingham's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is next weekend! Wollaton Hall is set for two days of fantastic music across five stages. #SplendourFestival

angles.name: Festival Fun in the Deer Park
angles.copy: Who's heading to Wollaton Hall for Splendour Festival? Get ready for a huge lineup and summer vibes!

moments.title: Bruno Mars Live in London
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars returns to London for multiple stadium shows on July 18, 19, 22, 24, and 25, marking his first UK performances in eight years.

angles.name: Bruno Mars Takes Over London
angles.copy: Get ready, London! Bruno Mars is back for a series of massive stadium shows starting next weekend. It's been eight years!

angles.name: 24K Magic in the Air
angles.copy: Who's excited to see Bruno Mars live in London? Five dates of pure pop and R&B brilliance are coming up!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary, will take place from July 23-26 at Henham Park, Suffolk, featuring a diverse lineup of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Suffolk's Summer Arts
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Four days of music, comedy, and more in Henham Park, Suffolk. #LatitudeFestival

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Celebrating two decades of incredible memories! Who's joining Latitude Festival for its 20th anniversary next week?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' held the #1 spot on the Official Singles Chart released July 10th, making it the longest-running #1 by a British act with 16 non-consecutive weeks.

angles.name: Chart Record Breakers
angles.copy: Huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' is officially the longest-running British #1 single ever! What a track. #OfficialCharts

angles.name: Still #1!
angles.copy: 16 weeks at number one for Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' just keeps dominating the UK Singles Chart. Deserved?

moments.title: Madonna Breaks UK Album Chart Record
moments.blurb: Madonna made history on the Official Albums Chart, becoming the first American woman to earn #1 albums across five decades with 'Confessions II', her 13th UK chart-topper.

angles.name: Queen of Pop Reigns On
angles.copy: Madonna, still breaking records! She's the first American woman with #1 albums across five decades on the UK chart. Icon status confirmed. #Madonna

angles.name: Five Decades of Dominance
angles.copy: Thirteen UK #1 albums and counting for Madonna! What's your favourite Madonna album that got to the top spot?

moments.title: 'Ann Droid' New BBC One Comedy
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in 'Ann Droid', a new BBC One comedy set in 2029 about a robot developed to assist the elderly, premiering this July.

angles.name: Diane Morgan's New Robot
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! 'Ann Droid' is the new BBC One comedy to add to your July watchlist. #AnnDroid

angles.name: Laughs from the Future
angles.copy: Set in 2029, 'Ann Droid' promises futuristic laughs with Diane Morgan. Who's tuning in for this one?

moments.title: 'The Dark' New ITV Crime Thriller
moments.blurb: ITV's gripping new crime thriller 'The Dark', adapted from G.R. Halliday's novel, follows a detective in the Scottish Highlands and premieres this July.

angles.name: New ITV Thriller
angles.copy: Get ready for a chilling new crime drama! ITV's 'The Dark' is set in the Scottish Highlands and looks like a must-watch this July. #TheDark

angles.name: Highlands Mystery
angles.copy: Laura Donnelly leads in 'The Dark', a new crime thriller on ITV. Who's ready for some gripping Scottish suspense?

moments.title: 'The Westies' Premieres on MGM+
moments.blurb: The new drama series 'The Westies', set in 1980s Hell's Kitchen following an Irish-American crime gang, premieres today, July 12th, on MGM+.

angles.name: New Crime Drama Drop
angles.copy: Calling all crime drama fans! 'The Westies', a new series about a notorious 80s Irish-American gang, premieres today on MGM+. #TheWesties

angles.name: 80s Gangland Story
angles.copy: Step into 1980s Hell's Kitchen with 'The Westies', dropping today. Looks like a gritty new series. Will you be watching?

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday, Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the one and only Stewart Copeland! The iconic drummer of The Police, still making music magic. #StewartCopeland

angles.name: The Police Beat
angles.copy: From 'Roxanne' to 'Every Breath You Take', Stewart Copeland's drumming defined an era. Wishing him a very happy 74th birthday!

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday, Ed Kowalczyk
moments.blurb: Ed Kowalczyk, lead singer of the rock band Live, turns 55 on July 16th.

angles.name: Live's Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to Ed Kowalczyk! The powerful voice behind Live's biggest hits. What's your favourite Live track? #EdKowalczyk

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 55th birthday to Ed Kowalczyk! Still rocking stages around the world. #BirthdayVibes

moments.title: Happy 30th Birthday, Luke Hemmings
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead vocalist of the pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: 5SOS Star Turns 30
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to Luke Hemmings from 5 Seconds of Summer! The Aussie pop-rocker hits a big milestone. #LukeHemmings

angles.name: A Decade of Hits
angles.copy: From YouTube covers to global superstardom, Luke Hemmings has achieved so much by 30! Celebrate his birthday with a 5SOS classic. #HappyBirthdayLuke

moments.title: UK Enjoying Hot Summer Weather
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a spell of hot summer weather, particularly across central and southern England, with temperatures reaching up to 35°C and a risk of thunderstorms later in the week.

angles.name: Soaking Up the Sun
angles.copy: It's a scorcher across much of the UK! Who's making the most of this hot summer weather today? Remember to stay hydrated! #UKHeatwave

angles.name: Summer Thunderstorm Watch
angles.copy: Enjoying the sun, but keep an eye on that forecast! Thunderstorms are a possibility for some parts of the UK later this week. #UKWeather
